ddls:
CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technology or programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "created" TEXT /* Creation date of the technology entry */,
  "owner_id" TEXT /* ID of the owner responsible for the technology */,
  "tech_category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category the technology belongs to */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL of the documentation for the technology */,
  "github_repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the GitHub repository for the technology */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the technology as active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_tech_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_category_id") REFERENCES tech_categories ("tech_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "tech_id" TEXT /* Reference to the technology used in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "project_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tech_categories" (
  "tech_category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the technology or programming language
Creation date of the technology entry
ID of the owner responsible for the technology
ID of the category the technology belongs to
URL of the documentation for the technology
URL of the GitHub repository for the technology
Flag to mark the technology as active or inactive
Reference to the technology used in the project
Unique identifier for each project manager
Email address of the project manager
